criminal-law.title: Criminal Law (IPC/CrPC)
criminal-law.explanation: Foundational statutes for law enforcement and judicial proceedings.

internal-security.title: Internal Security
internal-security.explanation: Managing national threats, insurgency, and border integrity.

police-ethics.title: Police Ethics
police-ethics.explanation: Moral conduct and community policing strategies.

mcqs.question: Which section of IPC deals with the punishment for Murder?
mcqs.explanation: Section 300 defines Murder, while Section 302 prescribes the punishment (Death or Life Imprisonment).

mcqs.question: Under which CrPC section is an FIR (First Information Report) registered?
mcqs.explanation: Section 154 of the Code of Criminal Procedure deals with information in cognizable cases (FIR).

mcqs.question: What is the maximum duration for which a person can be kept in police custody before meeting a magistrate?
mcqs.explanation: Article 22 of the Constitution and Sec 57 of CrPC mandate production before a magistrate within 24 hours.
